prompt.content: You have access to the SQL tables subscribers, device_purchases and invoices. Perform some data manipulations and analysis. Enrich the subscribers table with device purchase history from the device_purchases table. Each subscriber made no more than one purchase in device_purchases. Only consider records with full_price > 0 as actual purchases. Group subscribers into three sub cohorts: Cohort 1 - subscribers who made an actual device purchase with an installment_plan before (<) the time of last_updated. Cohort 2 - subscribers who made an actual purchase outright before the time of last_updated. Cohort 3 - subscribers who did not make an actual purchase before the time of last_updated. last_updated is the last modification timestamp from the subscribers table. Identify subscribers who had at least one overdue or disputed payment_status at any time point from the invoices table, namely subgroup X. For each of the three cohorts, report what percentage of subscribers are in subgroup X and what percentage of subgroup X subscribers also have at least one invoice of pending payment status at any point in time. The percentages should be in % values and rounded to one decimal point.

rubrics.name: Reports Cohort 1 has 11.2% +/- 0.5% of subscribers with overdue or disputed... (ver_e1abce15f7e94add9a4446e1f6073f10)

golden_responses.golden_text_response:
cohort pct_subgroupX pct_subgroupX_wtPending
Cohort 1 11.2% 18.0%
Cohort 2 10.5% 22.7%
Cohort 3 11.0% 24.5%

```
with SubscriberCohort as (
    select s.subscriber_id,
        case 
            -- Cohort 1: Actual purchase (Price > 0), installment plan, Before Last Updated
            when dp.full_price > 0 
                 and dp.purchase_type = 'installment_plan' 
                 and dp.purchase_date < s.last_updated 
            then 'Cohort 1'
            
            -- Cohort 2: Actual purchase (Price > 0), outright, Before Last Updated
            when dp.full_price > 0 
                 and dp.purchase_type = 'outright' 
                 and dp.purchase_date < s.last_updated 
            then 'Cohort 2'
            
            -- Cohort 3: Everyone else (No purchase, Price 0, or Purchase after update)
            else 'Cohort 3'
        end as cohort
    from subscribers as s
    left join device_purchases as dp 
    on s.subscriber_id = dp.subscriber_id
),

InvoicePayment as (
    select subscriber_id,
        -- Identify subgroup X with overdue or disputed payment, need to factorise in case variants 
        sum(lower(payment_status) in ('overdue', 'disputed'))>0 as is_subgroup_x,
        -- Determine if user has pending invoices
        sum(lower(payment_status) = 'pending')>0 as has_pending
    from invoices
    group by subscriber_id
),

CohortGroupInvoicePayment as (
    select s.*, 
        coalesce(i.is_subgroup_x, 0) as is_subgroup_x,
        coalesce(i.has_pending, 0) as has_pending
    from SubscriberCohort as s
    left join InvoicePayment as i
    on s.subscriber_id=i.subscriber_id
)

select cohort, 
    printf('%.1f%%', 100.0*avg(is_subgroup_x)) as pct_subgroupX, 
    printf('%.1f%%', 100.0*sum(has_pending*is_subgroup_x)/sum(is_subgroup_x)) as pct_subgroupX_wtPending
from CohortGroupInvoicePayment
group by cohort
```
